'''Nick Tate''', is an [[Wikipedia:Australian|Australian]] [[Wikipedia:Actor|actor]] and [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]]<ref name="NYT Profile" /> who played [[Xizor/Legends|Prince Xizor]] and [[IG-88D/Legends|IG-88]] in the [[1996]] [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']].<ref name="Shadows">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']]</ref> Tate went on to voice [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in the [[1997]] ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Read-Along]]''<ref name="ESB">''[[The Empire Strikes Back Read-Along]]''</ref> and ''[[Return of the Jedi Read-Along]]''<ref name="RotJ">''[[Return of the Jedi Read-Along]]''</ref>
